sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.2g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a tuber, this mostly lives or dies on carb behaviour.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.2g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a tuber, this mostly lives or dies on carb behaviour.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 27.9g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 27.9g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 1.5g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 1.5g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 29% DV, vitamin a at 11% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 29% DV, vitamin a at 11% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 19% DV, magnesium at 5% DV, iron at 4% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 19% DV, magnesium at 5% DV, iron at 4% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. practical staple carb source because tubers are often judged by how usable they are day to day. whole-food carb package because that matters because it is a cleaner baseline than heavily refined carbs. can be quite filling because a useful practical strength when the preparation stays sensible.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. still a carb-heavy category because that is the core ceiling tubers have to manage. preparation changes outcomes a lot because what you do to a tuber can make or break it. protein support is weak because tubers still need help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Yam stands out for practical staple carb source and whole-food carb package. but it also gets held back by still a carb-heavy category and preparation changes outcomes a lot. Best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 51 from a base nutrition score of 51. Context barely changed the result.
